description: Contributed to migration into a microservices architecture, improving scalability and deployment efficiency across core booking services. Constantly improving and revising with changes from stakeholders and seniors. Utilized Microsoft Azure DevOps for seamless project development and CI/CD pipelines to ensure code quality.

Led a team of interns in developing the mobile version of the company's online booking platform using Agile methodologies and Microsoft Azure. Collaborated on API system redesign, contributing to improved scalability and maintainability of backend services.

Responsible for maintaining and troubleshooting software and hardware across a university computer laboratory with over 200 units, ensuring optimal performance and minimal downtime. Provided technical support for Microsoft Teams and Moodle, assisting students and faculty with account management, connectivity issues, and platform navigation.
